ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] Discover how a [Genesis-sized ark](https://assets.arkencounter.com/doc/pdf/ark-stats-book.pdf) was built less than a decade ago. 
[ ] Learn the Ten Commandments. The song ["The Perfect Ten"](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OSXviJco41k&ab_channel=KyleJorris) can help.
[ ] Try [matzos](https://www.amazon.com/s?k=hand+made+shmurah+matzah&linkCode=sl2&linkId=b448b92883c384a551ccbe21365b4dc3&tag=chabadorg0d3-20&ref=as_li_ss_tl), the traditional bread eaten during the Jewish Passover feast. The feast takes place in the spring. Check to see if there is a Seder you can attend.
[ ] Act out the story of Moses.

[ ] Visit a museum of antiquities to see artifacts from the time of Christ.
[ ] View an artist's rendition of ["Solomon's 3D Temple."](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=y2tha7ogpec&ab_channel=MessagesofChrist)
[ ] Learn the names of the books of the Bible. ["The Best Books of the Bible"](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=powlzb2Rfdw&ab_channel=JumpStart3) song can help.

[ ] Take a [virtual tour of Biblical sites](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Nl5DNKf0mFw&t=13s&ab_channel=JohnDeLancey) in Israel. How many do you recognize from this year's readings?
[ ] Visit a [museum](https://www.google.com/url?q=https://www.bibleplaces.com/us-museums-artifacts-biblical-world/&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1748367712641153&usg=AOvVaw0rhMobIU0hSuu13wR5ZW0Z) that houses artifacts from Ancient Israel.
[ ] Create a "picture biography" of Jesus using your own brush drawings or fine art prints.
[ ] Act out one of the miracles of Jesus.
